channel.title: ROI on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in ROI on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: security: New Forrester study shows customers who unified with Microsoft Security benefited from 124% ROI
item.description:
Microsoft cites a new Forrester Total Economic Impact study saying organizations that consolidated on Microsoft Security saw a 124% ROI, lower risk, and improved readiness to secure AI. The post is a summary announcement and does not include detailed methodology or product changes.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog

item.title: ai: Build 2026: From observability to ROI for AI agents on any framework
item.description:
Microsoft’s Build 2026 post frames AI agent production challenges around accuracy, safety, accountability, and silent drift after deployment. It points to end-to-end observability as the path to managing agents across frameworks and tying operations back to business ROI.

  • Source: Microsoft AI Foundry Blog
